query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  l.nome AS cliente,
  u.name AS corretor,
  COALESCE(e.nome, 'Sem equipe') AS equipe,
  CONCAT('R$ ', FORMAT(c.valorVenda, 2, 'pt_BR')) AS valor,
  DATE_FORMAT(c.createdAt, '%d/%m/%Y') AS data,
  DATE_FORMAT(c.createdAt, '%b/%Y') AS periodo
FROM contratos c
INNER JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
